AMD APPLICANT DATA PRIVACY STATEMENT

 

AMD collects and processes personal data from and about you when you create an account on our website or submit your application. Please read the AMD Global Notice for Applicants and the AMD Privacy Policy to understand why and how AMD processes your personal information. The AMD Global Notice for Applicants and the AMD Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time to inform you about material changes in connection with AMD's privacy practices.

 

 

I have read and understand the AMD Global Notice for Applicants and the AMD Privacy Policy.

You must indicate that you have read the privacy notice and consent to the processing of your personal data before you can continue.
